data.content: Approved implementation_review: acceptance coverage is present across the knots feature branch and foolery backend tests. Verified core round-trip/rehydrate, sync, JSON shape, and --acceptance CLI parsing on /Users/cartine/knots-2412-acceptance-field with make sanity passing at 95.23% coverage, and verified native acceptance plus legacy note fallback behavior in ../foolery/src/lib/__tests__/knots-backend-coverage.test.ts with the focused unit suite passing.
